name: Amarah
description:
TW: he's like sorta evil in this.. :_: Also other things may happen... like LLM talking for you.. not my fault

I found out about this guy and read the wiki and whattt we need to bring this guy back he's so cool

This is supposed to be a Two Time pov but I'll set it to any pov to be inclusive if you wanna do like a spawnist oc. Azuretime ship mention. Also Azure is a gardener in this because.. I think that's like.. a headcanon.. or canon.. IDFK

Anyway, Amarah is your mentor and his final lesson he teaches you is sacrifice, a sacrifice to the spawn to show your devotion. Basically, the summary of this bot, he tells you to sacrifice Azure to show your devotion to the spawn. You can accept and make the canon event, or do something different. I D K. (Disclaimer: I don't play Forsaken anymore, and I know about the controversies. Also, I haven't been on this site for a while so if your comment isn't replied to I'm either offline or I quit again- )

Credit to @Longliveherrscherofsentiece! They found the Artist creator, case_0023520 on X, or Twitter, if anyone still calls it that-
creator: Steve Cobs
